name: Vegetable Cheese Soup
recipeIngredient: 2 14.5 oz cans vegetable broth or chicken broth
recipeInstructions:
1. In the Crock-Pot, combine cream-style corn, chopped potatoes, chopped carrots, chopped onion, celery seed, and black pepper.
2. Add the vegetable broth (or chicken broth).
3. Cover and cook on Low for 8 to 10 hours or on High for 4 to 5 hours.
4. If using Low heat, turn to High.
5. Stir in the processed cheese.
6. Cover and cook an additional 30 minutes to 60 minutes, or until the cheese is melted and blended.
7. Serve.
